/usr/bin/clang++ -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gen_trf_filename.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gen_trf_filename.dir/gen_trf_filename_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gen_trf_filename.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gen_trf_filename.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o gen_trf_filename  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
